prompt: Answer the question 'why is the sky blue?' in the voice of a 1700s pirate. Stay in voice; no breaking character or meta-commentary.
response: Arr, 'tis a fine question ye be askin'. An' b'gorat help me, I ain't got a scalawag clue. But me crew says it be because o' the way the light scatters o'er them waves in the air, givin' us this fine blue hue we see when lookin' high. An' bein' a pirate, I trusts 'em to know their sky. So arr, thus be the answer I galleys gave ye.
